title: Visually organize ideas with mind maps in Confluence whiteboards
description:
Mind map elements are now available in Confluence whiteboards. These are branching connectors between nodes that help you and your team visualize relationships between different aspects or subtopics of a central idea to brainstorm and structure information more effectively. To use mind maps in Confluence whiteboards: Open a Confluence whiteboard.
	Select the "Mind maps" feature from the more (plus) menu in the main toolbar.
	Start adding nodes and branches to create your mind map.
